BLOODMAZE-STRIKE_BLOOD_MAZE.title: Strike
BLOODMAZE-DEFEND_BLOOD_MAZE.title: Defend
BLOODMAZE-BLIZZARD.description: #Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Apply {WeakPower:diff()} *Weak* and {VulnerablePower:diff()} *Vulnerable*.
BLOODMAZE-BLIZZARD.title: Blizzard
BLOODMAZE-TORNADO.title: Tornado
BLOODMAZE-LIGHTNING.title: Lightning Flash
BLOODMAZE-MANA_DRAIN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Restore MP equal to the unblocked damage dealt.
BLOODMAZE-MANA_DRAIN.title: Mana Drain
BLOODMAZE-BITE.title: Bite
BLOODMAZE-ROCK_DRILL.title: Rock Drill
BLOODMAZE-WAND_STRIKE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each Magic card in your deck.
BLOODMAZE-WAND_STRIKE.title: Wand Strike
BLOODMAZE-SPIRIT_BOTTLE.title: Spirit Bottle
BLOODMAZE-OVERFLOW.title: Overflow
BLOODMAZE-MAGIC_CIRCLE.description:
Gain #{Block:diff()} #Block.
The next Magic Attack you play costs 0 Energy and 0 MP.
BLOODMAZE-MAGIC_CIRCLE.title: Completed Circle
BLOODMAZE-VAMPIRE_FORM.description:
#At the start of your turn, lose 8 HP.
Magic Attack cards spend HP instead of MP and gain *Vampire*.
BLOODMAZE-VAMPIRE_FORM.title: Bloodfiend Form
BLOODMAZE-HEALING_SPIRIT.title: First Aid
BLOODMAZE-DESPERATION.title: Desperation
BLOODMAZE-BLOODWAVE.description: Whenever you lose HP during your turn, draw 1 card.
BLOODMAZE-BLOODWAVE.title: Bloodtide Resonance
BLOODMAZE-IMMORTALITY.title: Immortality
BLOODMAZE-FLASH_INVINCIBILITY.descriptio: The next {BufferPower:diff()} times you would lose HP, prevent it.
BLOODMAZE-FLASH_INVINCIBILITY.title: Momentary Invincibility
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_SHIELD.title: Bloodstained Barrier
BLOODMAZE-ABRACADABRA.title: Abracadabra
BLOODMAZE-HOCUSPOCUS.description: For {Repeat:diff()} turns, enemy attack damage is reduced by 30%.
BLOODMAZE-HOCUSPOCUS.title: Hocus Pocus
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_PRICE.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Restore {MpRestore} MP.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_PRICE.title: Blood Price
BLOODMAZE-ANEMIA.title: Anemia
BLOODMAZE-MAGICAL_WAND.description:
#Deal damage equal to your current MP.
Whenever this card is *Retained*, reduce its cost by 1.
BLOODMAZE-MAGICAL_WAND.title: Magic Wand
BLOODMAZE-CRIMSON.title: Crimson
BLOODMAZE-FLOWING_RED_SCALE.description: #At the start of each turn, lose 3 HP, draw 1 additional card, and gain {FlowingRedScalePower:diff()} *Strength* and 2 *Plated Armor*.
BLOODMAZE-FLOWING_RED_SCALE.title: Crimson Scale Surge
BLOODMAZE-MAGICAL_SPRING.description: At the start of each turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
BLOODMAZE-MAGICAL_SPRING.title: Mana Spring
BLOODMAZE-REJUVENATE.description: #Heal 1 HP for each stack of Regeneration you have. {IfUpgraded:show:Do this 3 additional times.|}{InCombat:(Heals: {HealAmount}{IfUpgraded:show:+3|})|}
BLOODMAZE-REJUVENATE.title: Rejuvenate
BLOODMAZE-MORE_CHEERFUL.description: #Whenever you heal HP during your turn, gain {MoreCheerfulPower:diff()} *Strength*.
BLOODMAZE-MORE_CHEERFUL.title: More Power!
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_TOXICITY.description: #For the next {DebilitatePower:diff()} turns, *Weak* and *Vulnerable* are twice as effective against all enemies.
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_TOXICITY.title: Blood Toxin
BLOODMAZE-BLUT.title: Gauntlet
BLOODMAZE-WISDOM.description: #Return 1 card from your discard pile to your *hand*. It gains *Retain*.
BLOODMAZE-WISDOM.title: Wisdom
BLOODMAZE-MIXED_BLOOD.description: #Choose 1 card in your *hand*. *Transform* it into a random {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded }card from another character. It costs 0 this turn.
BLOODMAZE-MIXED_BLOOD.title: Mixed Blood
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_SWORD.description:
#Deal damage equal to your current HP. For each time you lost HP, this costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less. When played, increase its cost by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(5)}.
*Vampire*.
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_SWORD.title: Blood Sword
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_HUNT.title: Blood Hunt
BLOODMAZE-FATAL_INJURY.title: Fatal Wound
BLOODMAZE-WEAKNESS_EXPLOIT.description: #Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy has *Hemorrhage*, deal {Damage:diff()} additional damage.
BLOODMAZE-WEAKNESS_EXPLOIT.title: Exploit Weakness
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_STEALING.description: #Gain 1 Strength for each *Hemorrhage* on the target enemy.
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_STEALING.title: Blood Theft
BLOODMAZE-MONEY_EXCHANGE.title: Currency Exchange
BLOODMAZE-GORE_ARMOR.description:
#Gain {BaseBlock:diff()} #Block.
If you applied *Hemorrhage* this turn, gain {ExtraBlock:diff()} additional #Block.
BLOODMAZE-GORE_ARMOR.title: Gore Armor
BLOODMAZE-TIME_LIMIT.description: #Gain {RegenPower:diff()} *Regeneration* and {HemorrhagePower} *Hemorrhage*. At the start of your turn, gain {TimeLimitPower:diff()} *Strength* and 1 *Hemorrhage*.
BLOODMAZE-TIME_LIMIT.title: Time Limit
BLOODMAZE-PHYSICAL_HUNT.title: Physical Hunt
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_FLASK.title: Blood Flask
BLOODMAZE-SYRINGE.title: Syringe
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_ALCHEMY.title: Blood Alchemy
BLOODMAZE-LIFE_REVENGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Repeat for each time you healed HP this combat.
{InCombat:(Hits: {CalculatedHits})|}
BLOODMAZE-LIFE_REVENGE.title: Life Revenge
BLOODMAZE-HYPER_GROWTH.title: Hypergrowth
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_SPRAY.title: Blood Spray
BLOODMAZE-LINK.description: #Whenever you lose HP during your turn, apply {LinkPower:diff()} *Hemorrhage* to all enemies.
BLOODMAZE-LINK.title: Linked Fate
BLOODMAZE-LACERATE.title: Lacerate
BLOODMAZE-EXTRACT.description:
#Apply {HemorrhagePower:diff()} *Hemorrhage*.
Transform 1 card in your hand into a {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Blood Flask+[/gold]|[gold]Blood Flask[/gold]}.
BLOODMAZE-EXTRACT.title: Extract
BLOODMAZE-RESERVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have not spent MP this turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
BLOODMAZE-RESERVE.title: Reserve
BLOODMAZE-HARVEST.description: #Whenever an enemy's *Hemorrhage* reaches 20, restore {IfUpgraded:show:10|7} HP and MP.
BLOODMAZE-HARVEST.title: Harvest
BLOODMAZE-MANA_FORT.description:
#Gain X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} *Dexterity* this turn.
Gain {Block:diff()} #Block X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} times.
BLOODMAZE-MANA_FORT.title: Fortification
BLOODMAZE-SELECTION.description: #Choose 1 card from your *draw pile* or *discard pile* and add it to your *hand*.
BLOODMAZE-SELECTION.title: Selection
BLOODMAZE-CHRONO_BREAK.description: #This turn, *Retain* all cards in your hand and take an extra turn.
BLOODMAZE-CHRONO_BREAK.title: Chrono Break
BLOODMAZE-SILENT_CAST.description: Each turn, the first Magic Attack card you play costs nothing.
BLOODMAZE-SILENT_CAST.title: Silent Cast
BLOODMAZE-REFLUX.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
On Lethal, restore {IfUpgraded:show:10|8} MP.
BLOODMAZE-REFLUX.title: Reflux
BLOODMAZE-AGONY.description:
#Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each *Hemorrhage* on the enemy.
BLOODMAZE-AGONY.title: Agony
BLOODMAZE-ACTION_AND_REACTION.descriptio:
#Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain #Block equal to the unblocked damage dealt.
BLOODMAZE-ACTION_AND_REACTION.title: Action and Reaction
BLOODMAZE-QUICK_BLEED.title: Flash Bleed

#{IfUpgraded:show:Apply 1 Hemorrhage.
}Gain #Block equal to the target enemy's *Hemorrhage*.
BLOODMAZE-EXPLOIT.title: Exploit

#Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.

BLOODMAZE-REBURN.title: Reburn

BLOODMAZE-ROCK_WALL.title: Rock Wall

#Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever this card is *Retained*, reduce its cost by 1.
BLOODMAZE-FORESIGHT.title: Foresight

#Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the previous card you played was a Magic Attack, apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} *Vulnerable*.

BLOODMAZE-MANA_SHIELD.description: #Whenever you play a Magic card, gain {ManaShieldPower:diff()} #Block.
BLOODMAZE-MANA_SHIELD.title: Mana Leak
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_FLASK_SUPPLY.description:
#At the start of your turn, add 1 *Blood Flask+* to your *hand*.
This effect lasts X{IfUpgraded:show:+2|} turns.
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_FLASK_SUPPLY.title: Supply

#Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
On *Lethal*, upgrade a random card.
BLOODMAZE-AWAKENING.title: Awakening
BLOODMAZE-MUZIN.title: Limitless
BLOODMAZE-SETUP.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards and give 1 of them Retain.
BLOODMAZE-SETUP.title: Setup
BLOODMAZE-TENSION.title: Tension

BLOODMAZE-ETERNAL_NIGHT.title: Eternal Night
BLOODMAZE-OVER_HEAL.description: For this combat, remove your HP cap.
BLOODMAZE-OVER_HEAL.title: Overheal
BLOODMAZE-HEALING_BONFIRE.title: Healing Bonfire
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_PHOENIX.title: Phoenix Blood
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_BLIZZARD.description: #Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Apply {WeakPower:diff()} *Weak*, {VulnerablePower:diff()} *Vulnerable*, and {HemorrhagePower:diff()} *Hemorrhage*.
BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_BLIZZARD.title: Blood Blizzard

BLOODMAZE-BLOOD_PACT.title: Blood Pact
BLOODMAZE-RECALL.description: #Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add all cards with *Retain* from your *discard pile* to your *hand*.
BLOODMAZE-RECALL.title: Recall

BLOODMAZE-ARMAGEDDON.title: Armageddon
BLOODMAZE-RIPOSTE.description: #Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain #Block equal to half the unblocked damage dealt.
BLOODMAZE-RIPOSTE.title: Riposte
BLOODMAZE-GRUDGE.description:
#Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever this card is *Retained*, increase its damage by {IfUpgraded:show:5|4}.
BLOODMAZE-GRUDGE.title: Grudge
BLOODMAZE-EXECUTION.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
If the target has half HP or less, deal double damage.
BLOODMAZE-EXECUTION.title: Execution
BLOODMAZE-ENCHANTED_SHOES.title: Enchanted Shoes
BLOODMAZE-MELT.description:
#Gain {HemorrhagePower} *Hemorrhage*.
Transform all cards in your hand into {IfUpgraded:show:*Blood Flask+*|*Blood Flask*}.
BLOODMAZE-MELT.title: Melt
BLOODMAZE-INTIMIDATE.description: #The target enemy loses {IntimidatePower:diff()} *Strength* until the end of its turn.
